_comment: Sample OpenTripMap-shaped response for offline seeder runs (S11). Mirrors the upstream /places/radius envelope shape with our additive fields (country, destinationSlug, descriptionShort, image, nameLocal) for fixture-mode fan-out across the top-10 destinations. ~18 entries covering all 10 destinations with realistic xids / wikidata / kinds / categories.

features.name: Taj Mahal
features.descriptionShort: 17th-century white-marble mausoleum on the Yamuna river.

features.name: Agra Fort
features.descriptionShort: Mughal red-sandstone fort, UNESCO World Heritage Site.

features.name: Anjuna Beach
features.descriptionShort: Popular North Goa beach, famed for the Wednesday flea market.

features.name: Basilica of Bom Jesus
features.descriptionShort: Baroque basilica housing the remains of St. Francis Xavier.

features.name: Hawa Mahal
features.descriptionShort: Five-storey pink-sandstone palace facade, 1799.

features.name: Amber Fort
features.descriptionShort: 16th-century hilltop fort overlooking Maota Lake.

features.name: Munnar Tea Gardens
features.descriptionShort: Western-Ghats tea estates at 1600m elevation.

features.name: Alleppey Backwaters
features.descriptionShort: Network of brackish lagoons and lakes navigated by houseboats.

features.name: Masjid al-Haram
features.descriptionShort: Largest mosque in the world, surrounds the Kaaba.

features.name: Jabal al-Nour
features.descriptionShort: Mountain near Mecca; contains the Cave of Hira.

features.name: Al-Masjid an-Nabawi
features.descriptionShort: The Prophet's Mosque — second holiest site in Islam.

features.name: Quba Mosque
features.descriptionShort: First mosque built by the Prophet Muhammad.

features.name: Eiffel Tower
features.descriptionShort: Iron lattice tower built for the 1889 World's Fair.

features.name: Louvre Museum
features.descriptionShort: World's most-visited museum, in a former royal palace.

features.name: Colosseum
features.descriptionShort: Roman amphitheatre completed in 80 AD, capacity ~50,000.

features.name: Pantheon
features.descriptionShort: Best-preserved monument of Imperial Rome; 2nd-century AD.

features.name: Tower of London
features.descriptionShort: Historic castle on the north bank of the Thames; built 1078.

features.name: British Museum
features.descriptionShort: Public museum of human history; 8 million works.

features.name: Hagia Sophia
features.descriptionShort: 6th-century Byzantine cathedral, later Ottoman mosque.

features.name: Topkapı Palace
features.descriptionShort: Ottoman imperial residence for ~400 years.
